nasb.text: How blessed is the man whose strength is in You, In whose heart are the highways to Zion!

esv.text: Blessed are those whose strength is in you, in whose heart are the highways to Zion.

cnv.text: 靠你有力量，心中嚮往通到聖殿大道的， 這人是有福的。

ccb.text: 靠你得力量、向往到锡安朝见你的人有福了！

csbs.text: 那以你为自己的力量、 心中向往锡安大道的，是蒙福的！
